fields.title: remove service-level effect.runSync/runPromise usage
fields.description: Eliminate effect-collapsing calls in services/* by keeping state transitions in Effect programs and using runtime boundaries only where unavoidable. Includes prompt-modes, persistence, sandbox, footer, and worked-for bridges.
fields.close_reason: Removed service-level Effect.runSync/runPromise usage by refactoring persistence/state bridge and footer/prompt services to effect-safe snapshots.
